title: Amtech - 32-152mm Bi-Metal Holesaw Hex Arbour for Stable Drilling and Clean Cuts through Wood, Metal, and Plastic, Home DIY, Durable and Easy to Attach, Includes 6mm Pilot Hole Drill Bit
features: COMPATIBILITY: Suitable for use with Amtech Bi-metal holesaws ranging from 32mm to 152mm, providing flexibility for various cutting tasks.
EASILY ATTACHABLE: The hex arbour fits securely into a 1/2 inch drill chuck, ensuring a stable connection and easy attachment.
INCLUDES PILOT DRILL BIT: Comes complete with a removable 6mm pilot hole drill bit for precise and accurate drilling, preventing drift during operation.
VERSATILE USAGE: Ideal for use with a variety of materials, including wood, metal, and plastic, making it a reliable choice for different projects.
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Built to withstand the rigours of frequent use, ensuring long-lasting performance and reliability in every task.
description: Product Description The arbour is ideal for using on various materials, including wood, metal, and plastic. It’s compatible with holesaws ranging from 32mm to 152mm for added convenience. The arbour easily attaches to a ½ inch drill chuck to ensure stability and ease of use. The included removable 6mm pilot hole drill bit helps to guide the holesaw, reducing the risk of wandering for clean cuts every time. The arbour is built to withstand the rigours of frequent use for a long-lasting and reliable performance.
